indicators.name: Large open space
indicators.rationale: The large open space provides ample room for movement and comfort.

indicators.name: Well-lit environment
indicators.rationale: The well-lit environment reduces eye strain and fatigue during prolonged computer use.

indicators.name: Minimal distractions
indicators.rationale: The minimal distractions in the space allow for focused attention on the task at hand.

indicators.name: No furniture
indicators.rationale: The lack of furniture makes it difficult to set up a comfortable workspace.

reasoning_summary: The space is well-suited for computer work due to its large open area, good lighting, and minimal distractions, but lacks furniture to create a comfortable workspace.
